'''Joreikna''' was a large city on [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]]. Some of its business came from local mining of [[Ryll/Legends|ryll]], but the city was not dependent on mining for income. Joreikna's clan leaders, the [[Ku'rys]], came into conflict with the leaders of the nearby mining town of [[Lohema]], the [[Rooshan]] clan. Eventually, [[Ged Ku'rys]], an indecisive member of the head-clan, was targeted for assassination by the Rooshan clan.<ref name="GatORW" />
